summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 2-step checkout flow and full booking journey. All features working correctly: Homepage → Search → CarSelection → Checkout flow, 2-step checkout (Add card → Pay), saved cards for logged-in users, passenger details form for new users, MyBookings with cancel button, MyAccount page, Kiosk page with attract screen and Google Places search, Yandex Metrika in <head>.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: 2-step checkout flow working - Step 1: Blue 'Add your card' button for 0€ 3DS verification, Step 2: Green 'Pay X€' button after card verified
VERIFIED: Logged-in user with saved cards sees green 'Pay the reservation' button directly
VERIFIED: Logged-in user choosing 'new card' sees CardElement + blue 'Add your card' button
VERIFIED: New user (not logged in) sees Passenger Details form (firstName, lastName, email, phone, password) + Card Details + blue 'Add your card' button
VERIFIED: MyBookings page shows bookings with 'Annuler' cancel button on active bookings
VERIFIED: MyAccount page loads correctly without premature redirect, shows Profile/Reservations/Paiement tabs
VERIFIED: Kiosk page (/kiosk/bristol) shows attract screen → tap → destinations with Google Places search bar
VERIFIED: Yandex Metrika is in <head> (lines 56-63 of index.html) - NOT in deferred block
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing C# API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 2-step checkout flow features verified. Booking flow: Homepage → Search (Google Places autocomplete) → CarSelection (vehicles with prices) → Trip Summary → Checkout. For logged-in users with saved cards: shows saved cards list + green 'Pay the reservation' button. For logged-in users choosing new card: shows CardElement + blue 'Add your card' button. For new users: shows Passenger Details form + Card Details + blue 'Add your card' button. MyBookings has 'Annuler' cancel button. MyAccount has 3 tabs (Profil, Reservations, Paiement). Kiosk has attract screen + Google Places search. Yandex Metrika loads immediately in <head>.
